message:
feat(core): improve configuration, patterns, and runtime handling

Miscellaneous improvements across core modules:

- config.rs: Add new configuration options for integrations
- ingest.rs: Improve pane data ingestion with better error handling
- patterns.rs: Enhance pattern matching with edge case handling
- plan.rs: Minor adjustment to plan types
- runtime.rs: Improve runtime initialization
- accounts.rs: Minor account handling adjustment

These changes improve reliability and prepare for richer
integration with external tools.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
